privileged_info_summary: The task involves real, publicly-available federal government data. USASpending.gov is the official US Treasury-maintained federal spending database. The Department of Defense has a published spending profile on USASpending.gov. FY2023 (October 1, 2022 - September 30, 2023) is a real fiscal year with verified DOD spending data: total obligations of $609.2 billion ($431.4 billion in contracts, $167.4 billion in payroll, $10.4 billion in grants). Top 3 DOD contractors for FY2023 are Lockheed Martin ($61.4B), RTX ($24.1B), and General Dynamics ($22.9B). All data sources (USASpending.gov, FPDS-NG, Data.gov) are legitimate federal open data portals.
